company_name: Elite Software and Data Security, Inc
experiences: Architected the database schema and system integration layer for a Crew Management System (CMS), defining data flow across web, middleware API Gateway, and mobile-consuming services.
Engineered a centralized API Gateway that decoupled core microservices (Vessel API, Ship Visitation Reporting) from direct database access, improving service isolation and long-term maintainability.
Collaborated cross-functionally to document API specifications, enabling consistent integration across downstream consumers and reducing developer onboarding time.
Contributed to the Ship Certificate Management System by building user activity logging, an in-app notification system, and a password waiver security feature across backend and frontend.
Designed end-to-end UI/UX in Figma for KOCS v2.0, an internal circular and document management system-covering multi-role flows for crew, admins, manning staff, and principals.
Designed the UI/UX workflows for KRBS Payroll, an internal payroll system, delivering accuracy-first layouts suited for sensitive financial data entry and processing.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams and business analysts to gather requirements and ship accessible, standards-aligned features across multiple product cycles.
Built and maintained scalable full-stack web applications, owning features from design to deployment while ensuring clean, maintainable codebases.
Drove frontend quality by designing and refining UI components, bridging engineering and design to deliver consistent, high-performance user experiences.
Established integration and load testing workflows to proactively monitor, troubleshoot, and maintain application reliability at scale.
Improved backend performance through query optimization, reducing response times and increasing system scalability across high-traffic endpoints.
